source_pr.title: *: remove MemBuffer cache and  Release method.
source_pr.body:
After we reduced the cost to create a new MemDBBuffer by provide a global random variable,
It's no longer necessary to maintain a cache which may cause data race issues.

symptoms: It's no longer necessary to maintain a cache which may cause data race issues.
failure_signature: It's no longer necessary to maintain a cache which may cause data race issues.
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR (*: remove MemBuffer cache and  Release method.) appears to be primarily a functional/correctness/change or test refactor. The current evidence does not include a concrete flaky signature or a targeted stabilization change, so we conservatively mark it as insufficient_evidence.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).

evidence: evidence: It's no longer necessary to maintain a cache which may cause data race issues.
